## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's proposal for the CashFlow Desk project and align on next steps for RAMP's 2026 content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX proposed an 8-week strategy sprint ($18K total) followed by ongoing execution ($12K/month) for CashFlow Desk](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [RAMP to discuss internally and provide initial feedback by Monday's sync with George](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [Flexibility options discussed: potential to adjust scope or revert to RAMP.com work if CashFlow Desk underperforms](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide case studies on similar projects to support RAMP's internal discussions](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)

## Topics

### CashFlow Desk Proposal Details

  - [8-week strategy sprint: $18K total ($9K/month for 2 months)](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Ongoing execution: $12K/month (5 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Annual commitment with opt-out option after 7 weeks of strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
  - [Domain purchase and hosting costs not included in proposal](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)

### RAMP.com Content Considerations

  - [Current work averages 25 articles/week at $9K/month](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Potential reduced scope due to vendor directory changes](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Focus on experimentation and refreshes within existing content footprint](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [New team member joining soon, may impact content needs](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)

### Flexibility and Performance Validation

  - [RAMP concerned about validating AEO performance before long-term commitment](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [GrowthX open to adjusting scope or reverting to RAMP.com work if needed](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [Discussed potential for bundled package (CashFlow Desk + RAMP.com) at $18K/month](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)

### Case Studies and Proof Points

  - [GrowthX to provide relevant case studies (e.g., Town.com, Hero.com)](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
  - [RAMP requested growth patterns and month-over-month performance data if available](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)

## Next Steps

  - [RAMP to discuss proposal internally and with George](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [Initial feedback expected by Monday's sync with George](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare formal proposal once direction is confirmed](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide case studies and performance data for similar projects](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
  - [GrowthX to confirm details on hosting costs and infrastructure management](https://fathom.video/share/66zW1pEfuutiwVyk9rCzHyUXR-Z3TYXG?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
